pages.text: Tomorrow is Mina’s birthday. She is having a party in the garden.
Mina is going to the shops with Mum to buy a birthday dress.
“I want a blue dress,” Mina says. Mum finds a lovely blue dress.
Mina shakes her head. “I don’t want a blue dress.”
“I want a pink dress,” Mina says. Mum shows her a beautiful pink dress.
Mina folds her arms. “I don’t want a pink dress.”
“I want a green dress,” Mina says. Mum holds out a pretty green dress.
Mina frowns. “I don’t want a green dress.”
Mum says, “You don’t want a blue dress, you don’t want a pink dress and you don’t want a green dress.”
Mina says, “Yes! I love yellow. I want the yellow dress.”
